title: oncocalamus mannii
intro: Oncocalamus mannii, also known as the rattan palm, is a type of climbing palm native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncocalamus mannii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. Oncocalamus mannii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its extracts have been studied for their potential in developing new pharmaceuticals.
